name: Pingtung County (Taiwan)

colors.symbolism: purity, peace, and a bright future
the surrounding southern seas and the Pacific coastline
the agricultural plain and the southern mountain range
warmth and the vitality of the southern people

description: A white field charged at the centre with a multicoloured emblem combining a sun, a wave or sailboat motif, and the stylised characters 屏東 (Pingtung).
history: Pingtung County (Pingdong Xian) occupies the southernmost tip of Taiwan, including Kenting National Park. The current county flag bears an emblem combining a stylised sun, sea and the characters 屏東 ('eastern screen'), evoking the county's tropical climate, southern coast, and position east of the Central Mountain Range.

features.symbolism: stylised sun and sea with the characters 屏東 ('eastern screen'), evoking the county's southern position, tropical climate, and long coastline
